snippet.title: She Gets A SURPRISE! 😱
snippet.description:
Welcome to King’s Guard Tours, a channel dedicated to royal traditions, ceremonial events and British pageantry 🇬🇧

We bring you immersive and engaging videos of the Changing of the Guard, Household Cavalry events at Horse Guards, and major Royal Family events 👑

Our videos often feature the King and Queen, the Prince and Princess of Wales (Prince William and Catherine), and other members of the Royal Family, including Prince Edward, Duchess Sophie, and Princess Anne.

Wherever you are in the world, you are very welcome here. If you enjoy royal traditions, history, and behind the scenes glimpses of these iconic events, make sure to subscribe to King’s Guard Tours 🇬🇧

🔔 Subscribe here: https://m.youtube.com/@KingsGuardTours

⭐ Consider becoming a channel member to support the channel: https://m.youtube.com/@KingsGuardTours/join

King’s Guard Tours is an independent channel and is not affiliated with the British Army, Household Division, Ministry of Defence, or the Royal Household.

© Copyright Notice
All content on King’s Guard Tours, including videos, images and graphics, is protected by copyright law. Unauthorised use, copying, distribution, or reuse is strictly prohibited.

📩 Business and media enquiries: Hello@KingsGuardTours.com

snippet.title: Kevin Nash on working with Randy Orton
snippet.description:
Kevin Nash, wrestling's six-time World Heavyweight Champion and twelve-time Tag Team Champion, is inviting YOU to become an insider in the most exclusive band of rebels in the Podcast sphere! Kevin and his crew grabbed the wrestling business by the sack in the 90s and never let go, making his Kliq the most powerful faction in the history of the business, both on camera and off. They spent countless hours together, riffing on the business, the lifestyle, and everything else under the sun, and this podcast is no exception. Kevin left wrestling and built a successful career as an actor and guest on dozens of talk shows. His opinionated nature has made him the most requested guest of shoot interviews and network shows for more than a decade. Now, Kevin and his frequent host Sean Oliver, bring you all that you loved about their shows in this weekly podcast. No guest or topic is off-limits. Are you sweeeeet enough.......to be the next member of the Kliq?

CHECK OUT ALL OUR LINKS: https://linktr.ee/kliqthispodcast

snippet.title: Fan PROPOSES to Maria Sakkari! 💍
snippet.description:
The moment a fan proposed to Maria Sakkari in her match with Stefanos Tsitsipas against Katarina Zavatska and Matteo Berrettini in the Tennis Plays for Peace event ahead of the 2022 US Open. #Shorts

Don't miss a moment of the US Open! Subscribe now: https://bit.ly/2Pdr81i

The US Open is the final Grand Slam of the year and takes place at the USTA Billie Jean King National Tennis Center. The 2022 US Open saw Spain's Carlos Alcaraz and Poland's Iga Swiatek claim the men's and women's singles titles. It was both players' first US Open title, with Alcaraz claiming his first Grand Slam title and Swiatek claiming her third Grand Slam title. The 2023 US Open main draw is scheduled to go ahead between August 28 - September 10. Look out for highlights, extended highlights, full matches, press conferences, on-court interviews, hot shots, memorable moments, compilations and more! 

Twitter: https://twitter.com/usopen
Facebook: https://facebook.com/usopentennis
Instagram: https://instagram.com/usopen
Website: https://www.usopen.org

snippet.title: Woman wakes up in the coffin at her funeral #shorts
snippet.description:
An Ecuadorian woman has risen from the 'dead' after almost being buried alive.

Shocking video footage shows the moment 76-year-old Bella Montoya was rescued from her coffin, after being stuck inside for over four hours.

The woman was declared deceased after suffering a stroke in hospital and taken to a local funeral home for preparations.

#BuriedAlive #Ecuador #BellaMontoya #Coffin #10NewsFirst

localized.description:
An Ecuadorian woman has risen from the 'dead' after almost being buried alive.

Shocking video footage shows the moment 76-year-old Bella Montoya was rescued from her coffin, after being stuck inside for over four hours.

The woman was declared deceased after suffering a stroke in hospital and taken to a local funeral home for preparations.

#BuriedAlive #Ecuador #BellaMontoya #Coffin #10NewsFirst

snippet.title: Kevin Hart is counting down Will Ferrell’s days #Shorts #HartToHeart #WillFerrell
snippet.description:
Will Ferrell's full interview on Hart to Heart is streaming now on Peacock: https://pck.tv/3AdrWFY

Up Next: Dr. Dre. Plus, catch up on seasons 1-2 featuring interviews with Saweetie, Simu Liu, Jay-Z and more.

Synopsis: Armed with his insatiable curiosity, lightning wit and vintage wine, Kevin Hart sits down to interview A-list guests in the comfort of his virtual wine cellar for an uninterrupted hour of insight, truth, enlightenment and of course, some humor. Hart to Heart will dig deep to find out what makes these world class influencers tick, their goals and aspirations, their journey to stardom, and the obstacles they overcame to reach their lofty status. 

#Peacock #HartToHeart #KevinHart #WillFerrell #Shorts

Plus, stream exclusive Originals, NBC News, and your faves like The Office, Suits, Modern Family, and Yellowstone. Peacock is currently available to stream within the United States.
